message:
feat(fp-frame): add pow_df, Series.agg, and Series.groupby

- DataFrame.pow_df(): element-wise power with alignment
- Series.agg(["sum","mean","count",...]): multi-function aggregation
- SeriesGroupBy: groupby on Series with sum/mean/count/min/max/std/
  first/last/size methods
- 3 new tests (866 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
